name: Oxylabs
description: Fetch and process content from specified URLs using the Oxylabs Web Scraper API.
longDescription: Oxylabs MCP server for web scraping and data extraction. Provides universal scraper, Google Search scraper, Amazon product/search scraper, AI-powered scraper, crawler, browser agent, and search tools.
author: ai.smithery
examplePrompts: Scrape this webpage and extract the content
Get details for this Amazon product page
Crawl this website and collect all blog posts
